Project: Viewora

Tagline:
Her yaştan fotoğrafçının buluşma noktası.

Description:
Viewora is an AI-powered photography platform designed to help photographers improve their skills through automated analysis, personalized coaching and community learning.

The system analyzes user photos and provides feedback on composition, light, sharpness, storytelling and creativity.

Core Concept:
Artificial intelligence acts as a personal photography coach for every user.

Main Features:

AI Photo Analysis
Viewora analyzes uploaded photos and evaluates multiple photography dimensions including:
- light
- composition
- sharpness
- storytelling
- creative courage

Personal AI Photography Coach
Each user receives guidance based on their photos and performance history.

AI Personalized Learning Plan
The platform generates a custom learning path tailored specifically for the user’s skill level and interests.

Photography Academy
Structured photography lessons for beginners and advanced photographers including mobile photography.

Global Competitions
Users can participate in international photography challenges and contests.

Exhibitions
Users can showcase their work through curated digital exhibitions.

Groups
Users can create or join groups for:
- education
- mentorship
- photography trips
- private communities

Photographer Profile Intelligence
Viewora builds a photographer profile index using AI analysis to understand the user’s style, strengths and improvement areas.

Target Audience:
- mobile photographers
- photography students
- hobby photographers
- visual storytellers

Mission:
To democratize photography education through artificial intelligence and global community learning.

Technology:
Next.js
Firebase
AI visual analysis systems

Founder:
Muharrem Babacan

Website:
https://viewora.ai
